feat.name: Close Contract
feat.requirement: You have completed your active course of action but haven’t Dismissed it or chosen a new one.
feat.text: You’re bolstered when a plan comes together. You Dismiss your current course of action and gain 15 temporary Hit Points that last for 1 hour. The number of temporary Hit Points increases by 5 at 12th level and every 2 levels thereafter.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.
